description_long: This is a medium-sized woven wicker picnic basket with a sturdy, arched handle that rises from the center of the basket. The basket is filled with natural straw or raffia, providing a soft bed for two blooming hyacinth plants with green leaves and pinkish-purple flowers. Decorative elements include a pair of small, red, spotted mushroom ornaments and a touch of green moss, adding a whimsical, springtime feel. The weave of the basket is tight and uniform, with a slightly rounded rectangular base and gently flared sides. The handle is braided and securely attached to the rim, matching the basket's natural, light beige color. There is no visible lid, leaving the contents open and easily accessible.
description: A woven wicker picnic basket with a braided handle, filled with straw, blooming hyacinths, and decorative mushrooms. The basket is open-topped and features a natural, rustic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing two hyacinth plants, straw filling, and red mushroom decorations clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle centered, one hyacinth plant more prominent, and mushrooms partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hyacinths and straw, with the handle to the side and fewer decorations visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the handle centered, showing the back of the flowers and a hint of the mushrooms.
attribute_handle_type: Single, fixed, arched handle made of braided wicker, attached at two opposite sides of the rim.
attribute_weave_pattern: Plain, tight weave with uniform, horizontal and vertical wicker strands; slightly rounded rectangular base.
